title: Koby Breaks Through with Honesty Impact
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Garp, Unknown person #4, Marines, Kizaru, Bepo, Unknown person #5 as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If that gigantic hand goes down,

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Hundreds of civilians and Marines will....!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: What should we do, Vice-Admiral Garp?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up! I will create a quick opening.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN KOBY, YOU WILL DESTROY THAT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can I even do it against that thing?!}

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rear Admiral grus will protect the ship from the debris of the resulting destruction...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lieutenant Commander Helmepo, you make sure that no one gets in the way of those two!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must be able to make a decision in a snap!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! KOBY and the others are making a move!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They call you a "hero"? You're just a damn brat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He said you will destroy it but, D'you have a bomb with you or something, KOBY?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "What you can do"? You're up against a giant hand that's capable of crushing an entire battleship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You make sure that no one gets in the way of those two!

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
